{%- set root = get_section(path="_index.md") -%} {%- set sections = [] -%} {%- for sub in root.subsections -%} {%- set s = get_section(path=sub) -%} {%- set_global sections = sections | concat(with=[s]) -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- for group in ["Getting Started", "Reference", "Internals"] -%}
{{ group }}
{%- for s in sections -%} {%- if s.extra.group == group -%} {{ s.title }} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endfor -%}
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
